---
title: "CI/CD Workflow"
# note: theme below only applies for standalone quarto renders;
# pkgdown strips the meta tag, so appearance is controlled by pkgdown/extra.scss
format:
  html:
    mermaid:
      theme: neutral
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
    echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: pkgs
#| include: false
use("nemo", "nemo_gha_mermaid")
use("here", "here")
```

```{r}
#| label: mermaid_diagram
#| include: false
repo <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tidywf/actions/"
actions_url <- paste0(repo, "refs/heads/main/.github/workflows")
diagram <- nemo_gha_mermaid(
  actions_url = actions_url,
  deploy_yaml = here(".github/workflows/deploy.yaml")
)
```

```{r}
#| label: mermaid_diagram_cat
#| output: asis
cat("```{mermaid}\n", diagram, "\n```\n", sep = "")
```
